models.name: Gemma-4-E2B-it
models.description: A variant of Gemma 4 E2B ready for deployment using LiteRT-LM. Supports text input up to 32K context length.

models.name: Qwen3-0.6B
models.description: Lightweight Qwen model optimized for on-device inference. Ideal for fast text generation and reasoning.

models.name: Whisper-Small-GGUF
models.description: Whisper Small GGUF model for on-device ASR using LiteRT-LM. Converts speech to text locally.
